ul.li: Memory Limits: If identification results exceed SQLITE_LIMIT_WORKER_THREADS heap allowance, the RowID List is transparently spilled to a temporary B-Tree stored in sqlite3_temp_directory.
Concurrency: The SHARED lock held during Pass 1 allows concurrent readers. The escalation to EXCLUSIVE occurs only after the scan is finished, minimizing write-contention windows.

Anomaly Prevention: Deleting rows while scanning a cursor (one-pass) is prohibited if index updates are required, as b-tree page balancing (balance_leaves) may shift records to pages already scanned, causing rows to be missed or processed twice.
WAL Mode: Under Write-Ahead Logging, Pass 2 appends frames to the -wal file; actual database page modification is deferred to the checkpoint process.

g.title: SQLite Virtual Database Engine - Executes Bytecode
Temporary buffer for row identifiers to be processed in Pass 2

g.text: OP_Execute: DELETE FROM T WHERE C
